otherRequirements: A free visa waiver is granted on arrival for tourism, valid for up to 30 days
To stay longer than 30 days you must extend the visa waiver before it expires through the Qatar Ministry of Interior
If staying more than 30 days you must buy health insurance from a Ministry of Public Health (MOPH) registered provider before travel
sourceNote: gov.uk Qatar travel advice — free visa waiver on arrival for up to 30 days (https://www.gov.uk/foreign-travel-advice/qatar/entry-requirements)
